query:
SELECT 
  YEAR(createdAt) as ano,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  direcao
FROM arquivos
WHERE status = 'processado'
GROUP BY YEAR(createdAt), direcao
ORDER BY ano DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT 
  YEAR(createdAt) as ano,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  direcao
FROM arquivos
WHERE status = 'processado'
GROUP BY YEAR(createdAt), direcao
ORDER BY ano DESC;
